scripts.build: lerna run build --ignore main-site && lerna run build --scope main-site && npm run build:cp
scripts.build:cp: cp -r packages/hecho/build packages/main-site/_site/hecho && cp -r packages/por-hacer/build packages/main-site/_site/por-hacer && cp -r packages/escala-notas/build packages/main-site/_site/escala-notas
